description_long: This object consists of six boxy food trucks, each with a distinct color: white, red, green, yellow, black, and another white truck with graffiti art on its side. The trucks have a utilitarian, rectangular design with flat roofs, large front windshields, and side mirrors. The wheels are positioned at the corners, and the rear of each truck is plain, with minimal detailing. The trucks feature small, square headlights and simple grilles at the front, while the sides are mostly unadorned except for the graffiti on one truck. The overall appearance is functional and industrial, suitable for urban street vending. The trucks are lined up in a row, showcasing their color variety and straightforward construction.
description: A set of six boxy, industrial-style food trucks in various colors, including one with graffiti art. Each truck has a flat roof, large windshield, and minimal exterior detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grilles, headlights, and color differences of the six food trucks.
description_view_1: Angled top-down view highlighting the roofs and the graffiti art on the side of the nearest white truck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of the trucks and the color variety, with minimal rear detailing.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view from the opposite side, showing the plain sides and roofs of the trucks.
attribute_signage: graffiti art with blue and gray elements on one white truck; no other visible signage
